creator: walter.von.entferndt@posteo.net
text:
Please ignore my previous bug report concerning portmaster.  This seems to be a problem of the configure script of math/cantor, instead.

Package creation of math/cantor fails with the error that some R related stuff can not be found.  Prior to that, the configure script does not detect R, although R is installed.

This lets one install math/cantor by ignoring the error, but it breaks installation of meta-ports like x11/kde4.

How-To-Repeat: # portmaster --packages-build --delete-build-only --packages-local=/usr/ports/packages math/cantor
